op.note: HOST POST-op (unsandboxed) — RUNS FIRST because render-complete-lesson.mjs BUILDS the shared registry _lessonRegistry.generated.tsx (which the measured pass below needs to selectComposition), then renders the MP4 + contact sheet. It belongs on the HOST, not inside the agent (the shared-registry write is outside the per-lesson owns → seatbelt EPERM). A broken scene (e.g. the M3 backwards-interpolate range) crashes renderMedia here → onFailure:'block' ends the node 'blocked' → the warm-resume action op below re-runs the agent with the render's own stderr as feedback.

HOST POST-op (unsandboxed) — RUNS AFTER render so the registry it selectComposition()s already includes this lesson. The deterministic MEASURED pass: regenerates out/<id>/bbox-manifest.json from a real getBBox render. The AGENT never runs this — under --sandbox local a seatbelt-jailed measured pass EPERMs writing the SHARED _lessonRegistry.generated.tsx, and the agent then over-blocks. onFailure:'block' (the schema reserves 'retry'→'block') makes a crash / non-zero exit end the node 'blocked', which the warm-resume action op below acts on: the agent is resumed with consultPreamble evidence (the exact stderr) and re-authors, bounded by the action's max.

WARM-RESUME-ON-FAILURE (Reflexion / Self-Refine) — the feedback loop that REPLACES the agent's former self-run lesson:check fix-loop. When any POST render/measure op above OR a checks.post gate (both onFailure/policy 'block') fails, the node ends 'blocked'; runNodeWithRetries then reads THIS action op and resumes the node's pi session (session:'warm' → --session <id>) with the gate's DRIVER-VERIFIED critique (consultPreamble: the missing artifact / failed check / stderr tail) as a feedback-only turn; the agent fixes and the host re-runs every gate. scope:'feedback' = L1 warm-resume. The action's max:2 is the effective retry budget (opRetryMax wins over io.retry) — ≤3 total attempts, then the node BLOCKS. On a cloud/inmemory provider warm degrades to cold-with-feedback (the critique still reaches the retry). Author idiom mirrors gate-authoring.ts makeRetryAction: the ops stay onFailure:'block' and the retry rides THIS separate action op.

measure.note: MEASURE (post-run, out-of-band, NON-BLOCKING) — replaces the old per-argument and per-state templated-token gate array (fragile: an old argless run record or an empty state channel silently REJECTS those ops, both proven conditions in this repo) with an in-script, run-record-discovered lessonId plus a single deterministic pass. It (1) asserts bbox-manifest.json FRESHNESS against THIS run's own node window — closing the stale-manifest false-green where lesson-measured.mjs's main().catch swallows a render/extract crash to exit 0 without ever regenerating the file; (2) re-derives the method/collision/caption floor straight off the artifact; (3) asserts the bboxBinding measure-id-equals-manifest-id bijection (a broken bijection silently exempts an element by falling to zone "decoration" — the f1258 vacuous-green class); (4) guards manifest.ts's own allowedOverlaps exemption list against a phantom/dead id. See scripts/measure.mjs (full rationale) and memory.md.

run.note: MEASURE (post-run, report-only): the full render now runs as w4a's post-op, so the deterministic render sanity moved here from the former w5-render node. ffprobes the mp4 deliverable, independently re-measures loudness (loudnorm I=-16 LUFS/TP=-1), and cross-checks the contact PNG's freshness + its -contact.json legend duration against the mp4 — catches a corrupt/silent/truncated/un-normalized/stale-contact render that checks.post's non-empty alone misses. Full rationale in measure-render.mjs.

measure.note: All 9 measure-render.mjs checks (exists/ffprobe-ran/has-video/has-audio/duration-floor/lufs-within-tolerance/contact-freshness/contact-duration-match/loudnorm-completed) must pass; failedChecks in the report names which one didn't. Moved from the former w5-render node when the render folded into w4a's post-op.
